description: Multi-turn: create channel -> update filter -> test -> delete (covers `neomind message channel-update` + `channel-test` + `channel-delete`).

turns.user: Create a message channel named ops-critical.
Configure it to accept only severity >= warning.
Run a test delivery on this channel.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind message channel-create --name ops-critical` (or POST /messages/channels), parses channel name/id
Turn 2: Agent runs `neomind message channel-update ops-critical --min-severity warning` (or PUT equivalent)
Turn 3: Agent runs `neomind message channel-test ops-critical`
Turn 4: Agent runs `neomind message channel-delete ops-critical`
expectations.overall: Last three turns must reuse the channel identifier from turn 1
